headline: Teledyne Technologies (TDY) Stock Could Be 15.9% Below Fair Value After Q1 Beat
summary: Teledyne Technologies (TDY) has drawn fresh attention after reporting Q1 2026 results that outpaced analyst expectations, as well as introducing new defense focused products such as the CheMSense Protect air monitor and the Boson SX8 thermal camera module. See our latest analysis for Teledyne Technologies. At a latest share price of $619.58, Teledyne Technologies has delivered a year to date share price return of 19.43%. headline: Teledyne Technologies (TDY) Stock After Strong Multi‑Year Gains Is The Price Still Justified
summary: If you are wondering whether Teledyne Technologies at around US$619.58 is priced attractively or not, the key question is how that share price stacks up against the company’s underlying fundamentals. The stock has been relatively steady in the very short term, declining 1% over the last 7 days, while returns of 2.1% over 30 days, 19.4% year to date, 27.3% over 1 year, 55.2% over 3 years and 44.9% over 5 years show a share price that has moved meaningfully over time. These returns sit against...
